title: Look out for bronze whaler sharks in local waters
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Large numbers of...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Large numbers of bronze whaler sharks are currently present in the bay, close to shore.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Large numbers of bronze whaler sharks are currently present in the bay, close to shore."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In a Sharkspotters safety notice issued today, 24 October, Plett Sharkspotters head Melissa Nel saidthey are schooling sharks and their presence is part of natural marine activity in the area.","html":"In a Sharkspotters safety notice issued today, 24 October, Plett Sharkspotters head Melissa Nel said
they are schooling sharks and their presence is part of natural marine activity in the area."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“For your safety, please listen to lifeguards and follow all instructions they provide. Your co-operation helps keep everyone safe,\" Nel said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Look out for bronze whaler sharks in local waters
